agunfon_giraffe.note: Not a semantic mismatch - Kaikki's candidate lists both 'crested crane' AND 'giraffe' as senses of the same word (giraffes are noted as not traditionally native to Yorubaland, suggesting an extended/metaphorical use of the crane word). The only real question is the underdot: we have 'àgùnfon', Kaikki has 'àgùnfọn'. Still needs a decision on which spelling to use, just not for the reason first suspected.

pako_timber.note: Wood/plank is clearly the timber sense; naive keyword search missed it since gloss says "wood, plank" not "timber".

ikun_stomach.note: re-confirmed after testing the clear-decision fix

beelu_november.definitionText: November, the sixth month of the traditional Yoruba calendar, the Kọ́jọ́dá
